title: I Built My Entire Design System in 4 Hours With AI. Full Tutorial (Claude + Cursor + Figma)
description:
I built a complete design systemГўВҖВ”from Figma to production codeГўВҖВ”in 4 hours using AI. Here's the exact workflow I use.

Your team takes 2 weeks to ship a dashboard feature. Teams with design systems ship the same feature in 2 hours. The problem? Building a design system used to require months of dedicated engineering time. After working with 50+ B2B SaaS product teams, I've refined a one-afternoon workflow using Claude Code and Cursor that gets you from Figma design system to shipping features the same day.

This isn't just about generating componentsГўВҖВ”this is the complete strategic workflow: style guide extraction, component library building, and shipping real features.

What You'll Learn: 
ГўВҖВў The exact prompts I use to generate production-ready components 
ГўВҖВў Why you should build your style guide BEFORE components 
ГўВҖВў The notes.md workflow that documents everything automatically 
ГўВҖВў Real examples of 2-3x development speed increases

The Results: 
Teams with design systems report 38% improvement in product development efficiency, 40% faster time-to-market, and 34% faster task completion. This tutorial shows you how to achieve those numbers in one afternoon, not three months.

Need help implementing design systems for your product team? Get started with 15% off your first month when you mention this YouTube video. https://designproject.io/

Watch more like this: 
ГўВҖВў Stop Wasting Dev Time on Frontend: Figma to Code in 8 Minutes: https://youtu.be/BOl05zmQjOg
ГўВҖВў The Com

Г°ВҹВ’ВҺ Other Higgsfield generators (Nano Banana Pro 2, which I used to generate the globe): https://higgsfield.ai/ai-video

Summary ГўВӨВөГҜВёВҸ
Turns out you can build extremely high-end, sleek websites using two things: a skill by Leon Lin (https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill) + a video generator called Kling (which I'm using on Higgsfield) + Nano Banana Pro to generate images to feed into the video and so on. A bit frustrated that people are making it out to be more complicated than that, but that's basically it. Super straightforward and simple. Enjoy! 

My software, tools, & deals (some give me kickbacksГўВҖВ”thank you!)

Hey, this is an end to end, extremely comprehensive course all about AI agents. It covers the three modern agentic AI tools: Codex, Claude Code, and Antigravity, and is agnostic to whichever you use. 

I will guide you through initial setup; workspace configuration; and then a variety of foundational to prompting techniques like self modifying agent instructions, multi agent MCP orchestration, video-to-action pipelines, agent chatrooms, subagent verification loops, prompt contracts, reverse prompting, and even more!

title: How I Build a Production-Ready Design System with AI | Figma Make
description:
Г°ВҹВ“ВҢGet the follow along guide here: https://link.builderspace.ai/ai-design-system 

Г°ВҹВҺВ¬ Watch next: 
How to turn your figma design to frontend UI code: https://youtu.be/j-YvrDrH-sw 

Build a complete  AI design system with AI - from raw inspiration to production-ready UI components.

In this video, I walk you through the exact 5-step process I use to design scalable, consistent product ready UIs and Design systems using Figma Make

ГўВңВЁ What youГўВҖВҷll learn in this video

ГўВҖВў How to systematically collect and organize UI inspiration
ГўВҖВў How to build a structured mood board in Figma
ГўВҖВў How to generate real UI pages using Figma Make
ГўВҖВў How to extract a minimum viable design system from AI-generated screens
ГўВҖВў How to refactor UI code using design tokens for production
ГўВҖВў How to avoid the spaghetti code trap when scaling your UI

Г°ВҹВ•Вҗ Timestamps:

0:00 Product Requirements to Design Inspiration
1:22 Mobbin.com showcase
1:45 Collect inspiration for each page
5:25 Generating the design system in Figma Make
8:12 Refactor code and use on Cursor or Claude Code or Antigravity


Г°ВҹВ‘В©ГўВҖВҚГ°ВҹВ’В» Who this is for

ГўВҖВў Product builders and founders
ГўВҖВў Designers working with developers
ГўВҖВў Engineers building UI without a design system
ГўВҖВў Anyone using AI to speed up product design

Г°ВҹВ§Вӯ The 5-step process covered

1. Collect UI inspiration (pages, components, states)
2. Create a structured mood board in Figma
3. Generate UI pages with Figma Make
4. Extract a design system from the generated
